scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa and Tsunomaki Watame perform "Seishun Archive".
Transition interlude featuring a highlight reel of hololive members.
Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine perform "Yumemiru Sora e".

subtitles.original: 理想が　追いつけ　頑張れ　落ちて
subtitles.english: Let your ideals catch up, hang in there, and dive in!

subtitles.original: 青春　感じている　今　遊べ
subtitles.english: I'm feeling my youth, so I'll play right now!

subtitles.original: アチュー！
subtitles.english: Achoo!

subtitles.original: 成長した姿を見せたい
subtitles.english: I want to show how much I've grown

subtitles.original: ビターな完璧　本番はもっと全力で
subtitles.english: Bitter perfection, I'll give it my all for the real performance!

subtitles.original: ハイ！ハイ！ハイ！フー！
subtitles.english: Hi! Hi! Hi! Fu!

subtitles.original: 大切な思い出
subtitles.english: Even though I have so many

subtitles.original: たくさんあるけどね　まだ
subtitles.english: Precious memories, there's still...

subtitles.original: 感傷に浸ってる暇はない
subtitles.english: I have no time to be sentimental

subtitles.original: 今世紀最大級の夏が始まる
subtitles.english: The greatest summer of this century is starting

subtitles.original: 想像の果てにある高み
subtitles.english: The heights beyond our imagination

subtitles.original: 勝ち獲った景色は尊い
subtitles.english: The scenery we've won is precious

subtitles.original: 逃げるな限界の壁越えて
subtitles.english: Don't run away, overcome the wall of limits

subtitles.original: 僕らはまだチャレンジャー　イェーイ！
subtitles.english: We are still challengers, yeah!

subtitles.original: 冷たい豪雨に溺れたって
subtitles.english: Even if I drown in the cold downpour

subtitles.original: 確かな望みをたぐり寄せるように
subtitles.english: I'll pull my certain hopes closer to me

subtitles.original: 期待外れだと誰かが嘆く
subtitles.english: Someone laments that it wasn't what they expected

subtitles.original: 期待と痛いがいつも戦う
subtitles.english: Expectations and pain are always at war

subtitles.original: プライドだけを頼りに抗う　自分を信じたい
subtitles.english: Resisting with only pride, I want to believe in myself

subtitles.original: 努力は報われる　笑いたい奴は笑ってろ
subtitles.english: Effort will be rewarded, so let them laugh

subtitles.original: 感傷に浸ってる暇はない
subtitles.english: I have no time to be sentimental

subtitles.original: 今世紀最大級の夏が始まる
subtitles.english: The greatest summer of this century is starting

subtitles.original: 反響が足りない　もっともっと
subtitles.english: The echoes aren't enough, more and more!

subtitles.original: 後悔はさせない
subtitles.english: I won't let you have any regrets

subtitles.original: 想像の果てにある高み
subtitles.english: The heights beyond our imagination

subtitles.original: 勝ち獲った景色は尊い
subtitles.english: The scenery we've won is precious

subtitles.original: 逃げるな限界の壁越えて
subtitles.english: Don't run away, overcome the wall of limits

subtitles.original: 僕らはまだチャレンジャー　イェーイ！
subtitles.english: We are still challengers, yeah!

subtitles.original: hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025▷2026
subtitles.english: hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025▷2026

subtitles.original: 4th STAGE
subtitles.english: 4th STAGE

subtitles.original: 夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: Yumemiru Sora e

subtitles.original: （ボーカル）
subtitles.english: (Vocalizing)

subtitles.original: 重ねた手はギュッと離さずに
subtitles.english: Don't ever let go of our joined hands

subtitles.original: 行くよ　行こう　夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: Let's go, let's head to the dreaming sky

subtitles.original: 窓越しに見上げた
subtitles.english: Looking up through the window

subtitles.original: とても小さな空
subtitles.english: At a very small sky

subtitles.original: ここで出会えたのは
subtitles.english: Meeting here was...

subtitles.original: 数えきれない奇跡
subtitles.english: A countless series of miracles

subtitles.original: 繰り返した一歩が
subtitles.english: The steps we've taken over and over

subtitles.original: きらめきをつないで
subtitles.english: Connected the sparkles together

subtitles.original: 星のような笑顔
subtitles.english: A smile like a star

subtitles.original: 導いた
subtitles.english: Led the way

subtitles.original: Day by day
subtitles.english: Day by day

subtitles.original: みんなの声が力になる
subtitles.english: Everyone's voices give us strength

subtitles.original: Step by step
subtitles.english: Step by step

subtitles.original: ここでそれぞれ目指すもの
subtitles.english: What each of us aims for here

subtitles.original: それぞれ描くもの
subtitles.english: What each of us draws

subtitles.original: それぞれ願った夢
subtitles.english: The dreams each of us wished for

subtitles.original: 重ねた手はギュッと離さずに
subtitles.english: Don't ever let go of our joined hands

subtitles.original: 一人一人違う色で描き出すときめき
subtitles.english: A fluttering heart drawn in each of our different colors

subtitles.original: 振り向くことなく真っすぐに
subtitles.english: Heading straight without looking back

subtitles.original: 行くよ　行こう　夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: Let's go, let's head to the dreaming sky

subtitles.original: 笑い合ったことや
subtitles.english: The times we laughed together

subtitles.original: 尽きないわがまま
subtitles.english: And our endless selfishness

subtitles.original: 思い出いっぱいなのに
subtitles.english: Even though we have so many memories
